notes: GitHub Actions workflow created and pushed to zoputer-substrate repo. Workflow triggers on pushes to zoputer/learnings branch with changes in Learnings/** path. Uses peter-evans/create-pull-request@v5 action to auto-create PRs with checklist. Va-side review script (review_learning_pr.py) provides CLI for checking, reviewing, merging PRs with quality assessment including sensitive data detection, YAML validation, and confidence threshold gating. Testing of full flow (push to learning branch → PR auto-created) requires D4.2 completion to generate actual learnings content.
